game.short_text: A violent FPS boss rush where you must exchange blood For bullets

details.title: Blood Punk
details.description:
The world was in balance, but the greed of a monarch led him down a treacherous path. He ensnared an angel and EXCHANGED it's divine ichor with his own mortal blood. 
The balance was broken and the world fell into desolation. 
Now it is up to Numa, scion of the deluded monarch, with celestial blood coursing through her veins, to restore the balance.

game and music by chipMicro, created in 1 month for Boss Rush Jam 2024.

Mouse aim (sensitivity can be changed in the pause menu) 
ESC/P for Pauses menu
SPACE - Jump
Left Mouse - Shoot
R - Reload
1/2 or Mouse wheel - Switch Weapon
Wishlist the IMPROVED and EXPANDED full release coming 2025!

game.short_text: Sweet Hell is a short tough-as-nails MSX-inspired boss rush game
game.title: Sweet Hell

details.title: Sweet Hell
details.description:
Sweet Hell is a retro-platformer boss rush game inspired by the MSX Home Computer. The challenging game was created for the Boss Rush Jam 2024 (theme: Exchange).
The nightmare is blatantly inspired by some of my favorite games: Maze of Galious, La-Mulana 1 (the original version emulates the MSX graphical style) and La Mulana 2 (play these blind if you are even remotely interested in challenging time-consuming puzzle games), and Banana Nababa.
Story
Your brother has usurped your throne, assembling a formidable defense of legendary monsters. Eight bosses await in this game, which is as challenging as hell itself.
Controls
You can play the game using either gamepad, joystick or with a keyboard. For those who cherish the feel of retro gaming, there are options to use "up" for jumping and to switch between attack/jump commands, allowing you to play the game using an old joystick like the TAC-2 (as shown here).
Keyboard Controls:
Arrows - Move
Z - Jump
X - Attack
P - Pause
H - Toggle scanlines
I - Enable Iron Man mode (available at the first screen only)
K - Swap jump/attack functions
J - Use "up" for jump
As you sustain damage, your damage multiplier increases, doubling when you turn yellow, and tripling when you're down to your last health point.
Credits
The soundtrack of Sweet Hell features tracks from OpenGameArt.org by the talented Wolfgang_:8-bit Theme - Intensity under CC-BY 3.08-bit Theme - On The Offensive, 8-Bit Cave Loop, 8-Bit Battle Loop under CC0
The sound effects were also sourced from OpenGameArt from two distinct 8-bit sound packs:
NES 8-bit sound effects by shiru8bit, NES sounds by Baŝto under CC0
The 8x8 pixel font was created by danthedev on OpenGameArt:
8x8 1bit roguelike tiles / bitmap font under CC0
Development and MSX Emulation
Sweet Hell was programmed from scratch in vanilla JavaScript, using the traditional entity system that I'm fond of.
To emulate a real MSX game according to the technical constraints of the MSX home computer, the game adheres to several limitations:


A maximum of four single-color 16x16 or 8x8 sprites per vertical scanline.A limit of 32 sprites in total.A 32x24 tilemap comprised of 8x8 pixel tiles, with only two colors allowed per vertical tile slice (plus the background color).A fixed 16-color palette.
These constraints were rigorously followed and a custom sprite renderer was developed to manage the limitations, including automatic sprite cutoff when exceeding four per scanline and sprite color splitting for simplified color replacement and sprite counting.

The flickering effect seen in many vintage consoles and computers is an often-used workaround for the hardware sprite limit through a method called sprite multiplexing. Just like those old computers, the sprite renderer in this game needs to use multiplexing to draw additional sprites, leading to intentional flickering as sprites are selectively rendered frame by frame.



The levels were created using the Tiled map editor. It is extremely useful to be able to put a lot of special properties on tiles to be read in-game.
Final words
Your feedback, bug reports, or discussions on emulation are highly welcome!

game.short_text: You are a lowly crawdad, vying to topple the four ruthless crime lords who've usurped power in your neck of the bayou!
game.title: Boom Bayou

details.title: Boom Bayou
details.description:
🥈 2nd Place Winner of the 2024 Boss Rush Jam
*there have been several reports of performance issues on the browser version; if you’re experiencing poor performance please check out the windows build!*
You are a lowly crawdad, vying to topple the ruthless crime lords who've come to power in your neck of the bayou!Rise to the challenge using a wide arsenal of unique weapons and special powers across four fast-paced, multi-phase boss battles! Return to camp at any time, where you can freely exchange your loadout to experiment with different builds and play styles. Try different approaches and discover unexpected strategies!

CONTROLSWASD — MoveSpacebar — JumpLeft Mouse Button — FireR — ReloadNumber Keys — Switch to WeaponMousewheel — Cycle WeaponShift — Use Special PowerE — Interact / TalkP — Pause / UnpauseI — Open / Close Inventory (only at camp)F — Fullscreen (native builds)
Escape — Quit Game (native builds)
In the inventory, left click on items to grab them and move them around. Right click while holding an item to rotate it.

The web build of Boom Bayou will not run on macOS. We have included native builds for macOS and Windows.
A Bokoyoss game
Original soundtrack by Vertex Ray
Get the OST here: https://vertexray.bandcamp.com/album/boom-bayou-ost
Circus Track : Julius Fučík's "Entrance of the Gladiators", performed by the US Marine Ban https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Julius_Fu%C4%8D%C3%ADk%27s_%22Entrance_o... (Public Domain)
The macOS build is signed but not notarized; macOS may throw an alert when you try to run it.
If this happens, just open System Preferences>Security & Privacy>General and click Open Anyway. More info here: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/stable/tutorials/export/running_on_macos.html#do...
If you get a warning that the file is "damaged," just run this command in Terminal and then it will open normally:
xattr -d com.apple.quarantine file_path_to_app
You can just drag the app into the terminal window to get the file path easily.
Thanks for your patience! We hope you enjoy Boom Bayou!

game.short_text: Digital Roguelite Boss Rush. Trade your Life for Power. Fulfill your purpose.
game.title: Exaltator Nil

details.title: Exaltator Nil
details.description:
A short Roguelite Bullet Hell shooter, made for Boss Rush Jam 2024.
Never yielding. Constant struggle. Perpetual re-imagining of that which never happened. The Sea of Data holds within itself each and every secret, if you are daring enough to dive into it...
Trade your Life for Power by picking through a random selection of Overclocks. Wage war against Multi-part Bosses to destroy the remnants of an opposing system. Dive deep into the Mainframe, and find the purpose for which you were built.
Featuring:
16 boss fights, with gradually escalating difficulty.4 Weapon archetypes with 6 power levels, for a total of 24 weapon sets. Each weapon type has its purpose and suits different strategies.A wide selection of Overclocks to take after every battle, ranging from minor bonuses to game-breaking weaponry.Immaculate game balancing by a Sleep-deprived Rabbit.Soundtrack fresh from the Digital Ocean, made by Cybershroom.
Made in ~3 weeks for Boss Rush Jam 2024. There are a lot of unimplemented mechanics, and there will certainly be bugs. We hope you enjoy, regardless.


--------------CONTROLS--------------
Keyboard/Mouse:
    WASD - Move
    Left Mouse Button (LMB) - Shoot
    Q - Use a Bomb. Deals heavy damage to all enemies on screen, as well as makes you invincible for a time
    E - Siphon Ability. When Siphon Charge gauge is full, temporarily activate a strong life-stealing weapon
    Shift - Focus, slows you down (to dodge dense patterns better)
Gamepad:
    Not supported. You may still use it for movement, but you have to use mouse to aim.
Controls can be changed in the settings.

game.short_text: Arena shooter, retro-stylized bossfight game.
game.title: Xane

details.title: Xane
details.description:
Game created during Boss Rush game jam "Exchange", 2024. 
     
How to play this thing
The main goal is to kill the boss. A big dark flying creature with red glowing core. Your best  weapon is the lightning beam, which you activate by holding the  right mouse button. It deals huge damage per second. It is difficult to  hit small nimble beasts with it when they are far away, but up close  it is indispensable, and it is also the best weapon against the boss.  Using this beam requires plasma. You'll know it's over when the beam  starts to sparkle. You have some plasma at the beginning, but then you  need to collect yellow plasma balls that drop from burned monsters. In  this version of the game there is no plasma indicator; understanding the  available amount is only possible intuitively, with experience. Perhaps  in future versions I will do something with this.
 
Regular projectiles that you launch with the left mouse button do  only basic damage, it increases a little when you have plasma, but do  not try to focus on them, they are not effective in a serious mess.
 
At the same time, you need to maintain your “health”. There is no  scale or healthbar here. You won't be confused when your character  starts going crazy, the game will make it clear to you. The only way to  delay the madness a little is to exchange the accumulated plasma. To do  this, you need to go under the tetrahedron and hit it with a lightning  beam. When the tetrahedron lights up yellow, it means the exchange is  successful. The madness will subside, but for how long? The answer to  this is only your skill. This is the main idea of "Exchange", which is  the theme of the jam: you either have the beam or cure, you can't have  it all at the same time. 
Initially, this is designed to be a hardcore game. If you feel that it is too easy to play, let me know, you can record a video if you wish, I would be interested to know how other people play it. Anyway, thanks to all who played and rate it, your feedback is very important. I will surely continue developing of this project, your opinion will be very valuable for any further edits. Good luck inXane!
Hints 
Always move. Use jumps/hover and dash a lot. See controls ingame menu or check out a screenshot.

details.title: Vanguard Delta
details.description:
Vanquish the corruption of your cyber brethren as the vanguard knight, Delta. 
Mechanics
Equipped with the Aeon Shield, block at the right time to rejuvenate your Life-force. Also, the more Life-force you have, the stronger your Aeon Blade becomes! Beat the bosses in the fastest way possible to receive your personal best time!
Controls
ActionKeyboardGamepadMovementWASDLeft StickAttackLeft Mouse Button / JRight Button / X / ▢BlockRight Mouse Button / KLeft ButtonDodgeSpacebar / LA or B / X or 〇
Miscellaneous
Created for the Boss Rush Jam 2024 with the theme "Exchange". In this game, you convert enemy attacks into health & power with the Perfect Block system. I had around 2 weeks allotted for creating the game as I entered late into the jam, but hopefully you'll find this a satisfying experience. Thanks for checking it out!Inspired by the visuals and gameplay of games like:
Final Fantasy 16VanquishWo Long: Fallen DynastyExoprimal
Updatesv0.2.2Patched the game to apply Unity's Platform Protection.v0.2.1Updated to post-jam version with bug fixes, improvementsAlso introducing the new "EX-Charge" ability! (Perform a perfect block at full HP to enable Extra-Charged Mode which lets you unleash powerful ranged slash attacks).
Credits
Game Design, Gameplay, Visuals, & Sound Design:Peter Andrew GayaniloAnimations:Mixamo.com (mostly)But I did some tweaks to create "in-place" animations.Music & Ambient Sounds from Pixabay.com:OB-LIXSoundsEpicPhill_DillowJuliusHMusic_UnlimitedBreakzStudiosSUBMORITYSpecial mention:@JoostEggermont for inspiring the low poly/abstract art style of this game.Unzip and open application. game.short_text: Barter your way through the nine rings to get your precious cat back!
game.title: Fools Gold

details.title: Fools Gold
details.description:
A turn based boss-rush game made by a team taking part in Boss Rush Jam,  from the 5th Jan - 5th February 2024.  Play in full-screen for the best experience.

Fools Gold
Fools Gold is a turn based strategy game where you have to exchange fake goods to the unaware denizens and merchants of hell in order to take all their gold before progressing. Dive into the depths of hell and get back your precious pet and other possessions, without getting robbed yourself.
Theme: Exchange (+ boss rush)
We took the theme Exchange, and developed a bartering game with a turn-based system and strategy elements. Trade items with bosses, so they let you pass through their realm. But be careful, once you sell an item, it will not be available for future barters. Drain the wealth of each denizen and then exchange your goods to save wee Crumpet, your beloved cat.

Credits

Armand (Portfolio) - Game Designer, Technical Designer, Programming
Derek (Portfolio) - Audio Design, QA 
Charlie (Portfolio)- UX Designer, UI Artist, QA 
El (Portfolio) - 2D Artist
Heather (Portfolio)- Programming
Max (Portfolio)- Programming, QA
Robyn (Portfolio) - Producer
Sandra (Portfolio) - 2D Artist, Art Lead
Sylveon (Portfolio)- ProgrammingAll assets; art, code, design and audio, were made by hand during the game jam.
Can you save the lil guy from the claws of the greedy goddess?

SPACE(HOLD) - HIGH JUMP
SHIFT - SLOW MOTION
LEFT CLICK - PICK UP OBJECT
RELEASE - THROW OBJECT
RIGHT CLICK - EXCHANGE PLACES
HIT THE GREEN WEAK POINTS WITH OBJECTS TO DAMAGE THE BOSS-Green Weak points will spawn every once in a while. dodge attacks until then.
4 BOSSES, 3 HITS EACH.DOWNLOAD FILE AND EXTRACT, PLAY APPLICATION :)

game.short_text: Fight through bosses by exchanging equipment with them
game.title: Swap Scarf

details.title: Swap Scarf
details.description:
UNFINISHED
Fight through a gauntlet of five tough enemies, each with varying equipment that changes every run and can be stolen or swapped at your leisure. Swap often, as it's the ONLY way to restore your health during the challenge.
With five weapons, defenses, and abilities, there are around 125 combinations of enemies to fight.
CONTROLS: Go to INFO in the menuEQUIPMENT CATALOGUE
WeaponsDefensesAbilitiesSword - quick, low-damage slashesRotator- small shield that blocks any incoming damage, as long as it's facing the right directionSummon- summons two shades with low self-worthSpear- quick, low-damage, long range stabsBubble- encases user completely, but breaks easilyLock-On- near-guaranteed hit if the target is defenselessHammer- slow, high-damage swingsPhase- temporarily become invulnerable and immobile. If attacked, retaliate with a burst of tendrils.Pull- yank the opponent toward youPistol- six-shot revolver, short reloadBarrier- set up a large blockade that defends against anythingPush- drive the opponent awayRifle- high-damage single-shot, long reloadReflector- reflects bullets, but not much elseInvisibility- temporarily become invisible. The opponent won't know what to do when you're in this state

Game by Lion Yawn
Music by Pedro Nucci. Listen to more of their stuff here: https://soundcloud.com/nucciproducoes/sets/nucci-producoes-game-music/s-to0XJZOQ...

moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Boss battle, GameMaker, Pixel Art

details.title: Weapon Exchange Box
details.description:
Made for the Boss Rush Jam 2024, with the theme "exchange"!
Top down shooter where you have to exchange your weapons to be able to damage the boss.
Game has 3 bosses, the controls are all told in the game (except for pausing i guess, which is escape and tab)
(can't go fullscreen on web version because i hate html5 export)
I definitely recommend the downloadable version way more than the web version, it's way less laggy, you can actually go fullscreen (with alt+enter), and there were just really weird bugs only on the web export, but, I get if you want to play the web version.
This is also my first attempt at ever making music, so the music is pretty horrible lol

UPDATE:
So, after literally everyone's feedback was that the game was too hard, and about the 50th person saying the second boss was way too difficult, I have finally decided to update the game!
The main change is that now, theres a checkpoint between every boss, but a full rush version still exists after you beat the game.
Most of the attacks are easier now, more time to react, more telegraphs for the attacks, and the attacks are more fair in general.
Thank you so much to everyone that gave feedback on the game. I knew it just needed a few more tweaks to the difficulty to make it better, so I hope people experience more than just the second boss now!
The web version is the updated game, but the old version still exists as a downloadable, if you want to try that out for whatever reason

details.title: Soul Shift: Beast Mountain
details.description:
(you must be clicked into the game window to control it)Controls:WASD or Arrow keys     = Up Down Left RightSpace Bar                              = AZ , M or Left Click             = B
You, a dragon, once ruled as the king of Beast Mountain. That was until a mere human warlock emerged from the shadows. As he cast a spell to swap bodies with you, you quickly learned how it felt to be looked down upon. But a king doesn't abandon his throne... Climb Beast Mountain, swap bodies with other creatures, and reclaim your body in this intense Boss Rush!

game.short_text: Fight through all the Executives and Managers, to defeat the Z.E.O.
game.title: Rogue Bots (JAM VERSION)

details.title: Rogue Bots (JAM VERSION)
details.description:
Hello! And welcome to Rogue Bots.
Story:
Take control of three robots as they fight for freedom!
After they're tired of working for Robo-Corp, these three robots decide to group together and defeat the evil Z.E.O! (Zero Ethics Overlord)

Gameplay:
This is a Turn-Based game, inspired by Undertale & Deltarune. Use the available actions from your characters: Attack, Exchange or Skip. 
In this game, we took the Exchange mechanic as this: Your robots have each, one chip, this chip can change the tide of the battle, but how do you get new chips? You can exchange your chip with one from the boss. And it can affect many things, such as character velocity, damage, resistance, energy use, etc... You name it!
But you also have to think of what you give the boss, they could deal to you extra damage, or the projectiles could be faster, anything could happen!

Controls:
Movement = WASD / Arrow Keys
Also, use your mouse.

Credits:
Programming: Indie Seal, Ani.
Music & SFX: Kibblez.
Art & Animation: Boshiasdf, Pascal.
3D Modelling = FrigidVTX.
Game Design = Alex Vassilopoulos.

Extras:
There are still bugs, and we couldn't complete all the boss attacks we could've wished.
This game was made for the Boss Rush Game Jam 2024.

Known Bugs/Erros:
These are mostly just things we didn't have to do

-Last boss fight is really easy. 
-Screens in last boss fight were supposed to display gameplay, but it crashed the game every single time, so it was later removed.

moreInfo.Authors: Indie Seal, Kibblez, AniUDuck, swagzan6, Frigid, Bochos, EmberByte

Use upgrades to defeat four unique bosses, each corresponding to an element of nature. after each boss is defeated you can exchange your upgrades for better upgrades. Every upgrade has a cost, and you must exchange upgrades of the same cost.

Credits

Gameplay and graphics - Balatro
Music - The breakcore genre in general and this song by Blksmiith
Graphics and aesthetics - Kindanice
Game engine - Godot Engine
Find the code on GitHub

game.short_text: Find your purpose.
game.title: Epsilon Crisis

details.title: Epsilon Crisis
details.description:
Epsilon Crisis is a 3rd person bullet-hell action shooter, where you fight massive robots as a small robot with a special grapple arm, made in 1 month for the Boss Rush Jam 2024. Swap weapons with your enemies to gain their advantages, or to give them your disadvantages. Dodge and grapple through sheets of bullets with fluid momentum-driven movement.

Epsilon Crisis takes place in the far future, after a war between humans and robots, ended in the extinction of mankind. Desolate remains of civilization now in ruin, with numerous sentries now roaming the lands with no purpose left to fulfill. You have awoken for a reason. Find your purpose.

About the game:

As this game was made in 1 month, I only had enough time to make a few simple bosses, each ranging in difficulty and complexity. Each boss should take 2-5 minutes to complete.

This game features 2 chapters:Each chapter includes 3 levels, including the tutorial level in Prologue. Each level contains, or ends in, a boss.

This game features various weapons, each with unique traits. You can not reload, so choose which enemies to swap with wisely. Good swap timing is crucial.

All assets (aside from the fog and water, and a few SFX) were made by me. I'm not too proud of the music, but I think I did pretty good for my first time making breakcore(?) :)
Inspiration from: Evangelion, Armored Core, Returnal, Nier, Ultrakill, Blame!, etc.

Controls: (no controller as of now)

- WASD: Movement
- SPACE: Jump (Release for shorter jump, Hold for longer)
- LSHIFT: Dash (Consumes stamina, air/ground ok, no invincibility)
- RCLICK: Grapple (any surface ok, WASD to influence move direction, SPACE to cancel, consumes stamina while grappling)
-- RCLICK: Swap Weapon (Grapple at a weapon to swap your current weapon, works on enemies) (Aim assist for weapon grappling, precision for movement)
- LCLICK: Shoot Weapon
- R: Charge Stamina (Consumes 30% ammo, restores 40% stamina)


(no you can not wall-run)
System Requirements:
I have an Nvidia GTX 1060 3gb, 16gb RAM and it runs 144+fps on best settings. There are other graphics options.

Have fun! Any and all feedback is welcome.
Feel free to post your level times in the comments, I look forward to seeing your records!

I had a lot of fun making this game, and I intend on continuing development, so hopefully I can spice combat up so it isn't just "run and gun".Updatesv 0.2.1 : Fixed jump bug, Fixed Jormungand (will not float away), boss attack timings adjusted, weapon damage adjusted.

game.short_text: Deal with the devil. Overcome your limitations.
game.title: No More Angels

details.title: No More Angels
details.description:
Your soul was doomed by angels to be destroyed. 
In order to vanish the angels off the face of this realm, you make a deal with the devil himself.
A trade. He will use parts of your essence, and give you power, leaving you with less and less time.  
 Chase the angels. By killing them all, you get the chance of living again, and being free. 
You have a limited time. Make wise choices.

There is a total of 4 bosses in the game, in ascending order:
Archangel: The right sword of the elder god, the fiend-killer.Virtue: The ever-crying saint with an everfrost heart.Throne: The flesh abomination,  eyes of the sentinel.Seraphim; The flying-lightning.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/TheFaceleste
⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️IMPORTANT NOTES ⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️
Our team is pretty happy with the result we've had in the Boss Rush Jam. No More Angels is closer to what we wanted than what we expected. 
BUT..... 😨
We figured out after the jam's end that there were some bugs in the game. The leaderboard is one of them.
Apparently you can ONLY be there if you are with cheat mode activated. It's a bit useless.
So, if you want to show up in the leaderboard, press 'ESC' and activate 'CheatMode' under the options by the end of the game... Thx!
